preview.summary: Panama take on perennial overachievers Croatia in a Group L meeting at BMO Field, with knockout-round math likely on the line for both. Croatia bring tournament pedigree and midfield craft led by their evergreen captain, while Panama counter with organization, experience and an unbeaten qualifying pedigree. Expect Croatia to dominate the ball against a compact Panamanian block.
preview.homeForm: Ranked around 33rd, qualified unbeaten through CONCACAF as the group's lowest-ranked side on paper.
preview.awayForm: A top-15 side and 2018 finalists who finished third at the 2022 World Cup.
preview.homeKey: José Fajardo, the clinical forward and qualifying top scorer
preview.awayKey: Luka Modrić, the 40-year-old captain at his sixth World Cup
storylines: Modrić becomes one of the few men to play in six World Cups
Panama hunting a statement result against a heavyweight
Croatia's veteran spine chasing another deep run
preview.h2h: The two nations have no notable competitive history, making this a fresh meeting.
